name: cockroachdb
explanation: CockroachDB exposes a Prometheus-format metrics endpoint at the fixed path `/_status/vars` on its admin HTTP port (default 8080). The check is an OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2 subclass that hardcodes this default in `get_default_config`, so a generic OpenMetrics port-scan that probes `http://%%host%%:8080/_status/vars` is sufficient. The spec overrides `openmetrics_endpoint.required` to false because the check supplies the default. No credentials are required.
notes: No auto_conf.yaml ships with the integration, but the path/port are universal and the check defaults make discovery trivial.
